crime.value: Attempted murder by stabbing - the Chevalier stabbed the Marquise multiple times with his sword
crime.quote: the chevalier had drawn his sword, which was very short, and using it as a dagger, had struck her in the breast

victim.value: The Marquise de Ganges - targeted by her own brother-in-law despite her pleas for mercy and family affection
victim.quote: Chevalier, my dear brother, will you not have pity upon me, who have always had so much affection for you

closed_world.value: The private room where the Marquise met alone with the Chevalier while ladies waited in an adjacent room
closed_world.quote: Scarcely were they alone, when the marquise, joining her hands, knelt to him

culprit_and_motive.value: The Chevalier (brother-in-law) - motive unclear from excerpt but involves family conflict
culprit_and_motive.quote: the chevalier had drawn his sword, which was very short, and using it as a dagger, had struck her

resolution.value: The Chevalier was allowed to return to France after traveling abroad for two years, suggesting official resolution
resolution.quote: he was allowed, after travelling for two years in Italy and in Germany, to return undisturbed to France

suspect_architecture.value: Two primary conspirators: Chevalier de Bouillon (brother-in-law, motive: inheritance/control) and Abbé de Ganges (brother-in-law, religious authority), plus enablers like Madame d'Urban who later commits separate violence
suspect_architecture.quote: the chevalier had drawn his sword, which was very short, and using it as a dagger, had struck her in the breast

red_herring.value: The midwife consultation and occult séance setting initially suggests supernatural or medical motives, misdirecting from the family inheritance conspiracy
red_herring.quote: To consult the spirit, replied the woman of the sweet and tremulous voice.

social_world.value: French aristocratic hierarchy where Cardinal de Bouillon's influence can pacify victims' families with money, and royal letters-de-cachet control justice, showing institutional protection of nobility
social_world.quote: Two hundred pistoles, given by the Cardinal de Bouillon, pacified the family of the unfortunate pastry-cook

alibi.value: The pastry-cook death was reframed as 'apoplectic stroke' after family withdrew complaints, creating false narrative to protect Chevalier de Bouillon
alibi.quote: gave out that they had taken action too hastily on the strength of a story told in joke

reveal_mechanic.value: The marquise's direct testimony and physical evidence of seven sword wounds, plus the broken sword fragment embedded in her shoulder
reveal_mechanic.quote: indeed, he had struck with such force that the fragment remained embedded in her shoulder

media_and_audience.value: The crimes become theatrical and literary material, with playwrights and novelists repeatedly adapting the marquise's story while ignoring the children's fates
media_and_audience.quote: the playwright or the novelist calls up the pale and bloodstained figure of the marquise to appear

_meta.title: ebook alexandre dumas pere marquise de ganges
